description: The ultimate keyboard shortcut suite for AI-powered IDEs. ⚡️ Supercharge your workflow in VSCode, Cursor, Windsurf, Trae-ai & Kiro with intelligent AI orchestration, one-keystroke terminal switching, and battle-tested 75% keyboard layouts. Stop clicking. Start commanding.
ATM.notification.install.required: To use the GitLab panel, you need to install the "ATM" extension by(@gohitx).
MySkills.notification.install.required: To use the Skills panel, you need to install the "My Skills" extension by(@gohitx).
